summary: Frontend testing of Payment Processing page internal links, Business Loans page Square Financial card, 10 FAQs with FAQPage schema. ALL FEATURES VERIFIED WORKING on localhost:3000. Static preview environment (merchant-central-11.preview.static.emergentagent.com) has routing issues serving cached/old version.

integration_issues.issue: Routes /solutions/payment-processing and /solutions/business-loans are not rendering correct components on static preview. Shows generic SolutionDetail component or 'Solution Not Found'. Works correctly on localhost:3000.
integration_issues.priority: ENVIRONMENT ISSUE - Not a code bug

payment_processing_page.h1_verified: Payment Processing Solutions for Every Business

faq_section.faqpage_schema: PASS - JSON-LD schema found with 10 questions

static_preview_environment.issue: Wildcard route /solutions/:solutionId catching all requests instead of specific routes like /solutions/payment-processing
static_preview_environment.root_cause: Likely CDN caching or stale build on static preview server

action_items: NO CODE CHANGES REQUIRED - All features verified working on localhost:3000
Static preview environment needs cache clear or redeploy to serve latest build
Consider triggering a new build/deploy to the static preview environment
critical_code_review_comments: PaymentProcessingSolution.jsx correctly implements internal links using React Router <Link> component
BusinessLoansSolution.jsx correctly implements Square Financial card with amount $150,000-$1,500,000 and internal link to /pos/square
BusinessLoansSolution.jsx correctly implements 10 FAQ items with data-testid attributes and FAQPage JSON-LD schema
App.js routing order is correct - specific routes before wildcard /solutions/:solutionId
All code changes verified and working correctly on localhost
